title: salvia neohispanica
intro: Salvia neohispanica, also known as Mexican sage or blue sage, is a plant species belonging to the mint family that is native to Mexico and Central America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Salvia neohispanica include its ability to alleviate anxiety and insomnia, reduce inflammation and pain, and support cognitive function and memory. Salvia neohispanica can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine and as a dietary supplement.
